titleStmt.title: SII 27.431: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 431. (A.R. No. 75 of 1939-40.) MĀRŪRU, KARKAL TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken Slab (No. 2) set up behind the Pārśvanātha basti.
This is dated Śaka 1520, Hēmaḷaṁbi, Pushya śu. 2, Friday corresponding to 1597 A.D., December 30. The Śaka year was current.
It registers a gift of land by Pārśvadēvi Binnāṇi for worship and offering to Mēgananele Chadranātha, Ananta tīrthakara, Chavis-tīrthakara and other deities.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparama gaṁbīra syādvādāmōpha lāṁcanaṁ . jīyū
trailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . śrīmaṁnākinikāya nā
yakaśiraḥ kōṭīraratnaprabhā saṁdōhāṁcita pādapadma
yugalaḥ śrīpārśvatīrthēśvaraḥ . pāyātvāṁdyanṛpānujāṁ
sucaritāṁ biṁnāṇināmānvitāṁ saddharmāmṛtavārddhi caṁdirakalā
ṁśrīpārśva dēvīṁ sadā . svasti śrīmat sakavaruśa 1520 neya hēmaḷa
ṁbi saṁvatsarada puśyaśudda 2 śukravāradallu . śrīmatupāriśvadēviyarāda biṁ
nāṇiyaru mēgaṇanele caṁdranāthana Amṛtapaḍiya kuḷavargada vi
vara . dina 1 kke baḷla 4 lkedallu kāla 1 kke Akkimū 30 Ada kuḷa kṣētrada vivara
kānatimareṁ ba bayalagadde 1 rallu baruva Akkimu . 20 dērāḍi kaṁbuḷagadde 1 ra
llu Akkimū 10 Anaṁdatīrttakara dēhāra 1 kke Akkimū 3 cavistirttakara
dēhāra 1 A mū 3 varddhamāna tīrtakara dēhāra 1 Ā mū 1 cikkaAnaṁta
tīrttakara dēhāra 1 A mū 1 cikacavistīrttakara dēhā
kayya A mū 16 Aṁtu mēgaṇa nelege saluva A mū 74 dēvige yeṁṇege kuṁ
daya kōṭe bāḷinali varaha 12 yi sāsanava barasidavaru pāriśadēviya
rāda biṁnāṇiyaru . yi dharṁmmava kālakālakke naḍasuvaṁtāgi hiraṇyō
daka dhārāpūrvvakavāgi Ā caṁdrākkasthāyayāgi māḍidaṁthā dharṁmma
śāsana . yidharṁmmaśāsanake Aḷupidaṁtavaru Ujaṁtagiriya sāvira jena
biṁbava naḷida drōha vāraṇāsiyali sāvirakapiliya vadhisida drō
ha �yobhūmiyaḷla kālakke narakada dukhavanuṁbaru . śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.431 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
